diagrams.title: 2D Viewing Pipeline
diagrams.description: Shows the flow from window in world coordinates to viewport in screen coordinates
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how 2D scenes are mapped to screen regions

diagrams.title: Window-Viewport Transformation
diagrams.description: Geometric representation of mapping a rectangular window to a rectangular viewport
elements: Scaled and translated points showing correspondence

diagrams.title: 3D Viewing Pipeline
diagrams.description: Complete pipeline from 3D world coordinates through viewing to 2D screen display

diagrams.title: Cohen-Sutherland Outcodes
diagrams.description: 4-bit region codes assigned to points based on their position relative to clipping window
elements: 9 regions with binary codes (1000,0100,0010,0001 and combinations)
diagrams.purpose: Memorizing outcode assignment for line clipping algorithm

diagrams.title: Perspective vs Orthographic Projection
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing how parallel lines behave differently
elements: Perspective: lines converge at vanishing point
diagrams.purpose: Understanding difference between projection types and their visual effects

diagrams.title: UVN Camera Model
diagrams.description: Camera coordinate system showing U, V, N vectors relative to world coordinates
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how camera orientation is defined mathematically

visuals.title: Viewing With A Computer
visuals.description: Visual diagram for viewing with a computer
